heading: Expansion of, and reports on, mandatory sanctions with respect to financial institutions that engage in certain activities
label: 8513b Expansion of, and reports on, mandatory sanctions with respect to financial institutions that engage in certain activities

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Not later than 90 days after , the Secretary of the Treasury shall revise the regulations prescribed under to apply to a foreign financial institution described in subsection (b) to the same extent and in the same manner as those regulations apply to a foreign financial institution that the Secretary of the Treasury finds knowingly engages in an activity described in .August 10, 2012section 8513(c)(1) of this titlesection 8513(c)(2) of this title

knowingly facilitates, or participates or assists in, an activity described in , including by acting on behalf of, at the direction of, or as an intermediary for, or otherwise assisting, another person with respect to the activity;section 8513(c)(2) of this title
attempts or conspires to facilitate or participate in such an activity; or
is owned or controlled by a foreign financial institution that the Secretary finds knowingly engages in such an activity.

children.label: A
children.text: the effect of the regulations prescribed under on the financial system and economy of Iran and capital flows to and from Iran; andsection 8513(c)(1) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the ways in which funds move into and out of financial institutions described in , with specific attention to the use of other Iranian financial institutions and other foreign financial institutions to receive and transfer funds for financial institutions described in that section.section 8513(c)(2)(E)(ii) of this title

children.heading: Form of report
children.label: 2 Form of report
children.text: Each report submitted under paragraph (1) shall be submitted in unclassified form but may contain a classified annex.

children.heading: Financial institution
children.label: 1 Financial institution
children.text: The term “financial institution” means a financial institution specified in subparagraph (A), (B), (C), (D), (E), (F), (G), (H), (I), (J), (K), (M), (N), (R), or (Z) of .section 5312(a)(2) of title 31

children.heading: Foreign financial institution
children.label: 2 Foreign financial institution
children.text: The term “foreign financial institution” has the meaning of that term as determined by the Secretary of the Treasury pursuant to .section 8513(i) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: a financial institution organized under the laws of Iran or any jurisdiction within Iran, including a foreign branch of such an institution;

children.label: B
children.text: a financial institution located in Iran;

children.label: C
children.text: a financial institution, wherever located, owned or controlled by the Government of Iran; and

children.label: D
children.text: a financial institution, wherever located, owned or controlled by a financial institution described in subparagraph (A), (B), or (C).
